overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, elevated walkways, and bustling street-level activity. The character descends from an elevated pedestrian bridge, crosses a busy intersection, and enters the No-Tell Motel.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated pedestrian walkway in the rain, observing the neon-lit cityscape and holographic billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with black umbrella walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: black metal safety railing along the edge of the raised walkway
large glowing holographic billboard displaying a female figure
tall building covered in vertical pink and cyan neon light strips
solid roof covering protecting the walkway from rain
vertical digital display showing animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated pedestrian walkway at night, shielded from rain by an overhead canopy. Neon holograms and digital billboards illuminate the scene with pink and cyan light. The character walks forward along the concrete path, passing a pedestrian with an umbrella, while massive skyscrapers with glowing facades rise in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairwell transition from elevated walkway to street level

events.description: begins descending the concrete ramp from elevated walkway toward street level

agents.ego_description: walking down a concrete ramp with metal railings, transitioning from the elevated walkway to the street below

entered.detail: sloped concrete walkway with metal railings leading downward
metal barrel with open flames providing warmth and orange light
dark concrete building facade with small illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the walkway and approaches a descending ramp. The space becomes more enclosed as they walk down the concrete slope, passing a burning trash barrel on the right. The overhead canopy ends, revealing more of the surrounding building walls while the neon-lit skyscrapers remain visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial street with pedestrian crosswalks and storefronts

events.description: exits covered walkway and enters open street level exposed to rain
crosses a wet street at a marked crosswalk with other pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas

agents.ego_description: navigating through a busy street crossing, moving past pedestrians with glowing purple and blue umbrellas while avoiding vehicles

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing purple umbrella crossing the street
futuristic black car driving past on the wet asphalt

entered.detail: rain-soaked black asphalt road reflecting neon lights
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings
extended awning over sidewalk with green neon underlighting
bright signage including a prominent CANT BREATHE sign
tables and chairs under the canopy outside a restaurant

segments.scene_description: The character reaches street level and enters the open rain, crossing a wet intersection marked with yellow stripes. The street is moderately crowded with pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas. Futuristic vehicles drive past on the asphalt as the character walks along the sidewalk, passing under green-lit canopies and bright storefront signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: motel entrance lobby with intense pink neon lighting

events.description: enters the No-Tell Motel through a retractable metal security gate
lighting shifts to intense magenta and cyan neon interior illumination

agents.ego_description: walking into the No-Tell Motel entrance, passing through a metal security gate into a neon-lit lobby area

entered.detail: building entrance with bright pink neon sign reading MOTEL and NO VACANCY
metal accordion-style security barrier partially open at the entrance
intense pink and blue neon tubes illuminating the interior space
glowing cyan text sign reading NO-TELL with directional arrows
escalator or stairway leading upward inside the motel

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and enters the No-Tell Motel, passing through a retractable metal security gate. The exterior pink neon signage gives way to an intensely lit interior lobby bathed in magenta and cyan light. Inside, a glowing directional sign points the way, and an escalator is visible to the right as the character moves deeper into the building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit pedestrian bridge down into a more enclosed urban corridor. It begins on an elevated concrete walkway under a protective canopy, where pink and cyan light from holograms and digital billboards illuminates the path and the towering skyscrapers beyond. As the character walks forward past a pedestrian with an umbrella, the open vista of the city skyline remains visible in the background. The scene then shifts as the camera approaches and descends a concrete ramp, moving away from the overhead cover and into a tighter space. This descent leads past a burning trash barrel on the right, finally bringing the camera closer to the surrounding building walls while the distant neon towers continue to glow.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked city intersection into the neon-drenched interior of a futuristic motel. It begins at street level, crossing a wet asphalt intersection marked with yellow stripes amidst a crowd of pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas. As the camera moves along the sidewalk, it passes under green-lit canopies and bright storefront signage while futuristic vehicles glide past. The scene then shifts as the character approaches the No-Tell Motel, passing through a retractable metal security gate that transitions the view from pink exterior neon to an intensely lit lobby bathed in magenta and cyan. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the building, passing a glowing directional sign and an escalator to the right.
